"D:\Program Files (x86)\cmake\cmake-3.22.2-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\STACK.dir/objects.a
D:\PROGRA~1\gcc\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\STACK.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\STACK.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\PROGRA~1\gcc\mingw64\bin\X86_64~2.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\STACK.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o STACK.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSTACK.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\STACK.dir\linklibs.rsp
